caption: A man is seated in a studio, wearing a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders, a red and blue patterned bowtie, glasses, and headphones. He is wearing a tall, silver, pointed wig. He sits behind a black microphone equipped with a pop filter. The background is a wall adorned with various framed photographs and clothing items. On-screen graphics appear over the footage, including a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" and a logo on the right that reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". As the scene progresses, the man speaks and gestures with his right hand, which is briefly visible moving across his chest before returning to a neutral position. He maintains a consistent expression and posture while talking, with the camera remaining stationary throughout the sequence.
